title.zh: 环境数据分析与机器学习
title.en: Environmental Data Analytics and Machine Learning

mentoring.zh: 欢迎对能源系统、环境数据、人工智能、低碳城市和可持续基础设施感兴趣的同学联系。请在邮件中简要说明研究兴趣、技术背景和近期可投入时间。
mentoring.en: Students interested in energy systems, environmental data, artificial intelligence, low-carbon cities and sustainable infrastructure are welcome to contact me. Please briefly describe your research interests, technical background and availability.
